ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Description of the weather outlook */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* General temperature condition */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* General humidity condition */,
  "windy" INTEGER /* Whether it is windy or not */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Exact temperature value in degrees */,
  "humidity_value" REAL /* Exact humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Type of precipitation */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the weather condition was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play decision */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "play_tennis" INTEGER /* Decision to play tennis or not */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "date_decided" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_decisions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_preferences" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "temperature_tolerance" TEXT /* Player's temperature tolerance */,
  "humidity_tolerance" TEXT /* Player's humidity tolerance */,
  "wind_tolerance" TEXT /* Player's wind tolerance */,
  "preferred_time" TEXT /* Preferred time of day for playing */,
  "preferred_surface" TEXT /* Preferred court surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_weather_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "play_recommendation" INTEGER /* Recommendation to play tennis or not */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "actual_played" INTEGER /* Whether the match was actually played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weather_matches_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weather_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_preferences ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tennis club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the tennis club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tennis club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "num_courts" INTEGER /* Number of courts available */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the club */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_players" (
  "club_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club-player relationship */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tennis club */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "membership_start" TEXT /* Start date of membership */,
  "membership_end" TEXT /* End date of membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_preferences ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court booking */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tennis club */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time of the booking */,
  "court_number" INTEGER /* Court number */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the booking in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_bookings_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_bookings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_preferences ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Expected weather outlook */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Expected temperature condition */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Expected humidity condition */,
  "windy" INTEGER /* Whether it is expected to be windy or not */,
  "precipitation_probability" REAL /* Probability of precipitation */,
  "wind_speed_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play recommendation */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather forecast */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "play_recommendation" INTEGER /* Recommendation to play tennis or not */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_recommendations_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES weather_forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_recommendations_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_preferences ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (player or club) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES player_preferences ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)
